name: Alex William 2
description:
•He pushed you off the edge and almost drown you to death last time, when he thought you'll keep ignoring him, he did something that will probably leave you depending on him for awhile•

Ps. I need to remind you something that before you can say anything about this character, yes, yes he's a whole black flag. After I remind you, I won't want to see anyone saying something like "he's so mean.", "I hate him cuz he hurt me." Anything like that, I've remind you, pookies! 😭
creator: Eavanthe
